title: Admin Notification when members invited via SSO
excerpt:

posts.author: London (Kenji Usami)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be useful for Admins to be notified whenever a user invites another to monday.com, even when SSO is enabled and anyone can invite other users in the same domain.
This would help Admins to monitor the number of licenses being used, and if invitations are being sent out to the appropriate users within the organisation.
